<div><br></div>
<div>think out loud</div>
<div><b>got bought out by axiom - what will the industry look like because of GDPR - you canŐt sell information cookies and apple canŐt follow cookies on apple </b></div>

<div><b>whats the future look like for livepramp</b></div>
<div><b><br></b></div>

<div><br></div>
<div>ask culture</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Ń</div>
<div>product: </div>
<div>donŐt use walmart because private</div>

<div><br></div>
<div>onboardong = gather info from sources like surveys, gets put into profile, all tat gets sold to diff companies because cant do marking campaigns </div>

<div><br></div>
<div>what are you selling?</div>
<div>data</div>
<div>jeans from macys targeted through digital ad - i want all in black so next ad i see - it will be jeans of diff colors </div>

<div><br></div>

<div><br></div>
<div>What do you know about this position?</div>
